description: A strip of cracked asphalt narrows between two burned cars. Wire glints between the bumpers, and someone has painted a warning mark on the road.

options.text: Push through before anyone notices you.
options.summary_consequence: Chose a common survival route and lost resources without gaining leverage.

options.text: Trace the wire and disarm the trigger.
options.locked_text: You can see the wire, but not the pressure point that keeps it armed.
options.summary_consequence: Used perception to turn a trap into safe passage.

options.text: Read the raider mark and leave your own answer.
options.locked_text: The symbol means something, but you do not know what kind of answer it demands.
options.summary_consequence: Used raider knowledge to gain future intimidation leverage.

options.text: Turn the trap into a fake toll route for the next scavenger.
options.locked_text: You see the angle, but not the confidence needed to sell danger as protection.
options.summary_consequence: Converted roadside danger into a social bargaining chip.
